SPECIAL THANKS TO BROWNWOOD LAKE PATROL, BROWNWOOD AND BROWN COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AND BROWNWOOD AMATEUR RADIO CLUB.

THE FEDEX BUILDING AT THE BROWNWOOD REGIONAL AIRPORT LOST ITS ROOF AND THIS CAUSED EXTENSIVE WATER DAMAGE THROUGHOUT THE BUILDING. THE DAMAGING WINDS ALSO BROKE LARGE TREE LIMBS AND SNAPPED A TREE NEARBY. WINDS WERE ESTIMATED FROM 70 TO 80 MPH. SPECIAL THANKS TO THE CITY MANAGER, CITY OF BRADY, BROWNWOOD EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AND BROWNWOOD AMATEUR RADIO CLUB FOR THEIR ASSISTANCE.
